rulings.Case Title: VALERIE LEE VS. MICHAEL W. SPENCER et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion Tio Compel Further Responses To Request For Production Of Documents And Things, Special Interrogatorie3s, And For Monetary Sanctions
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Friday, April 02, 2014, line 4. PLAINTIFF VALERIE LEE'S Motion To Compel Further Responses To Request For Production Of Documents And Things, Special Interrogatorie3s, And For Monetary Sanctions Granted. A true and correct copy of the supplemental responses (see Martin Declaration 4) served by mail on March 21, 2014 (see POS to Exhibit A of Martin Declaration) do not contain verifications contrary to statement under penalty of perjury in 4 of Martin Declaration. Plaintiff is awarded sanctions in the amount of $1,455. = (501/REQ)
